title: Yellow Temperance's Assimilation
fact: Rubber Soul's Stand, Yellow Temperance, is an amorphous organic suit that absorbs and assimilates living flesh to grow larger. Because it is a physical entity, it cannot be broken or bypassed by other Stands.

title: Bad Company's Mini Army
fact: Keicho Nijimura's Stand, Bad Company, is a localized army comprised of miniature soldiers, helicopters, and tanks. Despite their small scale, their weapons fire fully functioning, lethal ammunition and explosive missiles.

title: Man in the Mirror's Separation
fact: Illuso's Stand, Man in the Mirror, allows him to create an isolated 'Mirror World'. He can selectively pull a target into this dimension while completely locking out their Stand, leaving the target entirely defenseless.

title: Clash's Liquid Teleportation
fact: Squalo's shark-like Stand, Clash, can instantly teleport between any bodies of liquid within a 50-meter radius, regardless of size—ranging from vast canals down to a simple puddle or a cup of soup.

title: Highway to Hell's Empathy Link
fact: Thunder McQueen's Stand, Highway to Hell, creates a direct life-and-death link with a targeted individual. Whenever Thunder McQueen attempts suicide or inflicts pain on himself, the target experiences the exact same trauma.

title: Sky High's Sky Rods
fact: Rikiel's Stand, Sky High, takes the form of a wrist-mounted tool that controls Sky Rods—cryptid organisms that feed on heat. Rikiel utilizes them to siphon body heat away from an opponent's specific nerves or vital organs, causing immediate localized paralysis.

title: Scary Monsters' Origin
fact: Dr. Ferdinand was the original user of Scary Monsters. Using the power of a Holy Corpse part, he could infect living beings and transform them into dynamic dinosaur sentries, though he could not transform his own body.

title: Tattoo You!'s Shared Body
fact: The Stand Tattoo You! belongs to a coordinated hit squad of eleven individuals. It allows all eleven men to simultaneously coexist inside a single physical body, instantly swapping who interacts with reality via a tattoo on their backs.

title: I Am a Rock's Attraction
fact: Yotsuyu Yagiyama's Stand, I Am a Rock, triggers a targeted gravitational force upon touching an opponent. It causes a specific type of material—such as chestnuts, rocks, or pine needles—to relentlessly swarm and crush the victim.

title: Cat Size's Translucent Wires
fact: Wild Cat Size is a trio of stray Siamese cats that share the integrated Stand, Cat Size. By shedding their fur, they generate long, razor-sharp translucent wires that track targets, automatically wrap around limbs, and progressively tighten.
